query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A man in a black tank top and ripped blue jeans sits on a leather couch, leaning forward with his forearms on his thighs and his hands clasped together. A focused overhead light illuminates his face and upper body, while the background—including window blinds behind him and the edges of the couch—recedes into shadow. Warm light grazes the vertical surfaces on either side of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man in a black tank top and ripped blue jeans sits on a leather couch, leaning forward with his hands clasped and his face set in an intense, confrontational expression. The portrait employs exposure extremes that crush the background into near-total darkness, revealing only faint outlines of window blinds and leather upholstery, while warm sidelight grazes the walls. The deep shadows and the subject's stern, challenging gaze create a pervasive atmosphere of dread and unease.
